name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this integration

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
